title: Voided Delight
body:
<center>

![Voided Delight Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ef7d35966d9d313a14cb31a0d30235418be85b6.png) 

</center>

**Voided Delight** is an [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) addon that adds compatibility for mods made by members of **TeamVoided**. It also adds small bug fixes and other silly features.

Currently Supported Mods:
- [White Pumpkins](https://modrinth.com/mod/white-pumpkins) 
	- Adds White Pumpkin Slices, White Stuffed Pumpkins and White Pumpkin Soup
- Dusk And Dungeons (As of now unreleased)
	- Adds Pumpkin Slices, Stuffed Pumpkins and Pumpkin Soups for all pumpkin variants
	- Golden Beetroot Crate and Soup
	- Many candy themed blocks and items

Changes to Farmer's Delight:
- Fixed skillet not rendering as enchanted when playing cooking animation
- (Experimental) Enchanted skillets now render as such when placed
- Skillets can cook items in ultra warm dimensions

Content this mod adds:
- Golden Carrot Crate
- Netherite Skillet - Works just like a regular one but twice as fast and with a lot more durability
- Netherite Cooking Pot - Works just like a regular one but twice
- The Skilleton - A skeleton made out of Skillet

Frequently Asked Questions
---
**Q. Can I use this mod into my modpack?**

A. Yes! Just make sure to credit us, and don't claim Voided Delight as your own creation.

**Q. Which Minecraft versions will the mod be updated for?**

A. Voided Delight is currently being updated for 1.21.1. Any other versions are currently not supported.

**Q. Are you going to support NeoForge?**

A. No, At the current moment there are no plans to support Neo.


Thank You <3
---
Thank you to Vectorwing for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight).
And thank you to The Team behind [Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) their fork
